articles.title_en: Vietnam Inaugurates Ho Chi Minh City's Largest Wastewater Treatment Plant
articles.summary_en: MONRE announces the operational launch of the Binh Chanh advanced wastewater treatment facility in HCMC.

articles.summary_en: MONRE launches a new strategy for water security and infrastructure, inviting significant private investment.

articles.title_en: Mekong Delta Pilots Smart Water Management System for Sustainable Treatment
articles.summary_en: MONRE supports an AI-powered water quality and treatment pilot project in the critical Mekong Delta.

articles.title_en: Vietnam's EPR Scheme Sees Full Enforcement in Solid Waste Management
articles.summary_en: Vietnam's EPR scheme sees full enforcement in 2026. Producers now responsible for waste costs; early results vary.

articles.title_en: Stricter Penalties, Enhanced Monitoring Drive Compliance in Vietnam's Waste Sector
articles.summary_en: Vietnam's environmental agency tightens penalties and enhances digital monitoring for waste compliance in 2026.
articles.source: Ministry of Natural Resources and Environment (MONRE) Press

articles.title_en: New Waste-to-Energy Plants Open, Boosting Vietnam's Sustainable Waste Goals
articles.summary_en: New waste-to-energy plants open in Vietnam in 2026, boosting sustainable goals and cutting landfill reliance.

articles.summary_en: ADB greenlights a major loan to upgrade key highways, boosting connectivity and trade in Vietnam's south.

articles.summary_en: ADB commits funds for flood control and sustainable agriculture projects in Vietnam's vulnerable Mekong Delta.

articles.title_en: ADB Boosts Smart City Initiatives in Hanoi with New Digital Infrastructure Loan
articles.summary_en: Hanoi receives ADB funding to enhance digital infrastructure and urban services, supporting its smart city goals.

articles.summary_en: A landmark ADB-backed project in Vietnam's Mekong Delta completes, providing clean water and sanitation to 500,000 residents.

articles.summary_en: ADB-supported projects in Central Vietnam integrate climate-resilient designs and smart tech to secure water access amidst changing weather patterns.

articles.summary_en: World Bank-funded infrastructure project significantly boosts climate resilience and water access for Mekong Delta communities.

articles.title_en: Vietnam's Water Sector Transformation: World Bank Partnership Paves Way for Sustainable Future
articles.summary_en: World Bank partnership transforms Vietnam's water sector, fostering sustainable management and climate adaptation strategies.

articles.summary_en: JICA extends a substantial ODA loan for the crucial expansion of Ho Chi Minh City's Metro Line 3, boosting urban transit.

articles.summary_en: Vietnam's industrial parks saw robust FDI, benefiting from stable policies and strategic infrastructure upgrades.

articles.summary_en: Eco-friendly infrastructure and green incentives are drawing significant foreign direct investment to Vietnam.

articles.summary_en: New highways and port expansions in Northern Vietnam are boosting industrial park land values and FDI.

articles.summary_en: Ho Chi Minh City's Metro Line 1 marks its first full operational year in 2026. This vital urban railway has significantly eased congestion and transformed daily commutes for thousands.
